params.value: SELECT OwnerId, Owner.Name, COUNT(Id) FROM Task WHERE TaskSubtype = 'Call' AND Status = 'Completed' AND CreatedDate >= 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z AND CreatedDate <= 2026-03-31T23:59:59Z GROUP BY OwnerId, Owner.Name ORDER BY COUNT(Id) DESC LIMIT 200

CUSTOM_ACTION.path: query/?q=SELECT OwnerId, Owner.Name, COUNT(Id) FROM Task WHERE TaskSubtype = 'Call' AND Status = 'Completed' AND CreatedDate >= 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z AND CreatedDate <= 2026-03-31T23:59:59Z GROUP BY OwnerId, Owner.Name ORDER BY COUNT(Id) DESC LIMIT 200
